restart-repl.reason: All three bounded pre-C2 designs require the immutable-code/mutable-session separation defined by C2.0: platform reset exits to BASIC, CRT re-entry sees session-mutated Bank 5, and a correct whole-image verifier/restore does not fit the current resident boundary.
required_acceptance: two consecutive public restart-repl calls on a real MEGA65
fresh Lisp65 banner and usable REPL after each call
no stack, mutable-session, symbol, directory, or shelf-state leak
valid Attic code identity remains unchanged

implementation_status: Wave 2 delivers read-from-string. restart-repl is removed from the 1.1 surface by owner decision and carried explicitly by C2.3.
hardware_claim_limit: Wave 2 makes no restart-repl claim and exports no such function. The retained failed receipts are C2 design evidence, not partial delivery evidence.
